mapper.select:
SELECT nr.*, u.realname as executorName FROM elder_nursing_record nr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON nr.executor_id = u.id WHERE nr.del_flag = 0
and nr.checkin_id like concat(concat('%',#{data.checkinId}),'%')
and nr.customer_id like concat(concat('%',#{data.customerId}),'%')
AND u.realname like concat(concat('%',#{data.executorName}),'%')
AND nr.item_code = #{data.itemCode}
AND nr.`status` = #{data.status}
ORDER BY nr.create_time DESC
